  API -->|Internal| Database

  Database -->|Internal| DataStore[Data Store]
  DataStore -->|Encrypted| EncryptedDataStore[Encrypted Data Store]
  subgraph Cloud
    AzureAD[Azure AD]
  end
  WebApp -->|SAML| AzureAD
  AzureAD -->|JWT| API", "integrations": [{"source": "Web App", "target": "API", "protocol": "HTTPS", "type": "Web", "direction": "inbound"}, {"source": "API", "target": "Database", "protocol":
